pr.title: Value Residual + Gated Attention + XSA + EMA + AdamW TTT — val_bpb pending H100

output.summary: Stacks SwiGLU, value-residual + gated attention, XSA, EMA, and AdamW test-time training atop thwu1 base to reinforce deep-layer signal flow.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Runs AdamW test-time training on validation tokens (three epochs with frozen bottom layers) ahead of each evaluation.
techniques: SwiGLU MLP plus value-residual and gated attention on the thwu1 10-layer base
EMA shadow weights paired with AdamW test-time training over validation data
